name: KrillApp.Executor.SMTP
title: SMTP
description: Sends an email via SMTP when executed. Uses the source node name as the email subject. If the source is a DataPoint, the latest snapshot value is included in the email body. Configure SMTP server, port, credentials, and recipient address.
shortDescription: Sends an email via SMTP when triggered by a source change or parent execution.
llmPurpose: Sends an email notification via SMTP with source node data when triggered.
llmBehavior: connects to configured SMTP server with credentials
builds email subject from source node name
includes DataPoint snapshot value in email body if source is a DataPoint
sends plain text email to configured recipient
llmTypicalUseCases: send email alert when sensor value changes
notify via email when a threshold is crossed
email notification on device state change
llmCreationHints: Create an SMTP executor when the user wants email notifications. Requires SMTP server host, port, credentials, and recipient address. Optionally configure a source DataPoint to include its value in the email.

llmConnectionHints.role: action node that sends email notifications via SMTP

llmExamples: Send me an email when the temperature sensor goes above the threshold.
Email an alert when the device goes offline.
Send an SMTP notification with the latest reading.
